componentSpecs.name: BaseRepository
componentSpecs.description: Abstract generic class `BaseRepository<T>` in `src/shared/db/base.repository.ts`. Wraps the pg Pool from `src/shared/db/connection.ts`. Subclasses must implement `protected abstract get tableName(): string`. Methods: `findById(id: string): Promise<T | null>` — SELECT by id with parameterized query; `findAll(filters?: Record<string, unknown>): Promise<T[]>` — SELECT with AND-conjoined exact-match WHERE clauses, camelCase keys mapped to snake_case columns; `create(entity: Omit<T, 'id' | 'createdAt' | 'updatedAt'>): Promise<T>` — INSERT with RETURNING *, id generated by DB DEFAULT (uuid), timestamps by DB DEFAULT NOW(); `update(id: string, updates: Partial<T>): Promise<T | null>` — UPDATE with RETURNING *, strips id/createdAt/updatedAt from updates, sets updatedAt = NOW(); `delete(id: string): Promise<boolean>` — DELETE by id, returns true if rowCount > 0. All queries use parameterized queries ($1, $2, ...) — no string concatenation of SQL.

componentSpecs.name: NotFoundError
componentSpecs.description: Error class in `src/shared/errors/index.ts` extending Error. Constructor takes `entityName: string` and `id: string`. Computes message as `${entityName} with id ${id} not found`. Exported via barrel.

componentSpecs.name: ValidationError
componentSpecs.description: Error class in `src/shared/errors/index.ts` extending Error. Constructor takes `message: string` and optional `fieldErrors: Record<string, string[]>`. Stores fieldErrors as a public readonly property. Exported via barrel.

componentSpecs.name: ConflictError
componentSpecs.description: Error class in `src/shared/errors/index.ts` extending Error. Constructor takes `message: string`. Exported via barrel.

componentSpecs.name: SharedTypes
componentSpecs.description: Barrel export `src/shared/types/index.ts` exporting enum `LeaveRequestStatus` (DRAFT, SUBMITTED, APPROVED, REJECTED, CANCELLED) and enum `EmploymentStatus` (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, TERMINATED).
